mapper.update: update media set name = #{name}, url = #{url}, img = #{img}, sortID = #{sortID}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into media (name, url, img, sortID,isShare, addTime, updateTime) values (#{name}, #{url}, #{img}, #{sortID}, #{isShare},#{addTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update media set isShow = 0 where id IN
#{id}
